channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Less Than TV「中METEO」 同日に極小バージョンも開催決定 https://natalie.mu/mu…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
Less Than TV「中METEO」
同日に極小バージョンも開催決定
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680010?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

FIRE BOYS、GOFISH、黄倉未来
SLIGHT SLAPPERS、U.G MANが
1部屋ずつ貸し切ってライブ

各部屋に入れるのは3人
合計15人を無料で招待

#極小METEO
item.content:encoded:
Less Than TV「中METEO」
同日に極小バージョンも開催決定
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680010?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

FIRE BOYS、GOFISH、黄倉未来
SLIGHT SLAPPERS、U.G MANが
1部屋ずつ貸し切ってライブ

各部屋に入れるのは3人
合計15人を無料で招待

#極小METEO

item.title: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes. n.pr/4vWco75
item.content:encoded: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes. n.pr/4vWco75

item.title: Kalshi says it has blocked "dozens" of trades from campaign …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Kalshi says it has blocked "dozens" of trades from campaign insiders, but experts say the company's approach leaves lots of potential loopholes. NPR has found at least one trade that slipped through. n.pr/4h8Xju2
item.content:encoded: Kalshi says it has blocked "dozens" of trades from campaign insiders, but experts say the company's approach leaves lots of potential loopholes. NPR has found at least one trade that slipped through. n.pr/4h8Xju2

item.title: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than workers who never went to college, that program could be cut off from federal student loans. But is a degree just about making more money? n.pr/4aMrgMO
item.content:encoded: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than workers who never went to college, that program could be cut off from federal student loans. But is a degree just about making more money? n.pr/4aMrgMO

item.title: 🔥ONE N' ONLY 沢村玲🔥 ZOZOマリンで念願のセレモニアルピッチ⚾️ 「いつも感動をくれる選手の…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
🔥ONE N' ONLY 沢村玲🔥
ZOZOマリンで念願のセレモニアルピッチ⚾️

「いつも感動をくれる選手のみなさんに
　感謝を込めて投げたいと思います！」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680084?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

沢村は千葉ロッテマリーンズの大ファン。対オリックス・バファローズ戦のセレモニアルピッチに登場する。

item.title: The Egyptian Football Association (EFA) said Wednesday it "c…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Egyptian Football Association (EFA) said Wednesday it "cannot remain silent" after what it believes was unfair and biased officiating in Egypt's 3-2 round of 16 loss against Argentina on Tuesday. n.pr/44ldAEN
item.content:encoded: The Egyptian Football Association (EFA) said Wednesday it "cannot remain silent" after what it believes was unfair and biased officiating in Egypt's 3-2 round of 16 loss against Argentina on Tuesday. n.pr/44ldAEN

item.title: The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early Thursday, and Tehran responded by targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Qatar in crossfire that again threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war. n.pr/3SI5Xpw
item.content:encoded: The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early Thursday, and Tehran responded by targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Qatar in crossfire that again threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war. n.pr/3SI5Xpw

https://natalie.mu/music/news/679991?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

ザ・クロマニヨンズほか多数出演

#いしがき2026 #いしがきミュージックフェスティバル

item.title: ScHoolboy Q’s ‘Blank Face LP’ came out 10 years ago today. …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
ScHoolboy Q’s ‘Blank Face LP’ came out 10 years ago today.

Tonight, he revealed that a new album called ‘THANK QUE’ is on the way.
item.content:encoded:
ScHoolboy Q’s ‘Blank Face LP’ came out 10 years ago today.

Tonight, he revealed that a new album called ‘THANK QUE’ is on the way.

item.title: Breaking: Graham Platner has dropped out of the Senate race …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Breaking: Graham Platner has dropped out of the Senate race in Maine following an allegation of sexual assault against him.
www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Breaking: Graham Platner has dropped out of the Senate race in Maine following an allegation of sexual assault against him.
www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: New & Notable: New from GENERIK*, this single is a breathles…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: New from GENERIK*, this single is a breathless combo of sci-fi instrumentation and deft, mile-a-minute rhymes.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: New from GENERIK*, this single is a breathless combo of sci-fi instrumentation and deft, mile-a-minute rhymes.

item.title: Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support. n.pr/4h3t47S
item.content:encoded: Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support. n.pr/4h3t47S
